evidence.description: REQ-EPNS-001 through REQ-EPNS-012 each have corresponding tests. Classification table (REQ-EPNS-007) fully tested at step1 level with property and example tests. Pipeline tests cover all 7 execution paths (idle, empty, dirty-success, dirty-fail, same-note-editing, same-note-save-failed, save-failed-retry).

Lines 51-63: PROP-EPNS-005 compile-time exhaustiveness. Lines 66-91: PROP-EPNS-015 type-level membership assertions. Lines 203-652: Integration tests covering all PROP obligations PROP-EPNS-006 through PROP-EPNS-019.

Lines 103-196: idle, empty-string, whitespace-only, dirty, save-failed, save-failed-with-pending, saving-throws, switching-throws, editing-null-throws, save-failed-null-throws — all classification edge cases covered.
Lines 244-271: All 6 SaveError-to-NoteSaveFailureReason mapping variants tested (permission, disk-full, lock, not-found, unknown, validation).

Lines 376-403: Same-note on SaveFailedState verified (SameNoteNoOp, no blurSave, error state preserved). Lines 434-468: Save-failed retry with different note, save fails again — pendingNextNoteId updated to new selection.

Lines 27-66: switch exhaustive over all 5 EditingSessionState variants. idle->no-current, editing->empty|dirty via isEmpty, save-failed->dirty, saving/switching->throw. Null-note guards at lines 32-36 and 48-52.

Lines 44-98: switch exhaustive over CurrentSessionDecision. no-current->no-op (no Clock, no I/O). empty->clockNow()+emit(EmptyNoteDiscarded). dirty->blurSave, success->emit(NoteFileSaved), fail->clockNow()+emit(NoteSaveFailed)+Err(SwitchError). Lines 102-112: mapSaveErrorToFailureReason correctly maps all FsError variants.
Lines 27-52: clockNow() called once, hydrateSnapshot called, NewSession constructed with startedAt=now, EditorFocusedOnPastNote emitted with occurredOn=now.

Lines 72-122: Pre-pipeline guard (same-note check) at lines 79-93 correctly short-circuits with SameNoteNoOp. Pipeline orchestration at lines 96-121 correctly threads ports and previousFrontmatter through all three steps.

Pure core with zero imports from ports/I/O modules. Only imports domain types (Note, EditingSessionState, CurrentSessionDecision). Local isEmpty function at lines 70-73 matches NoteOps.isEmpty semantics.

Clean separation: pipeline imports three step functions and orchestrates them linearly. Port types defined locally and threaded to sub-steps. getCurrentNoteId helper at lines 125-128 minimal and correct.
PROP-EPNS-001: 1000-run property test with valid (state, note) pairs across idle, editing, save-failed. Date.now() spy confirms no hidden clock dependency.
PROP-EPNS-002: 1000-run constant property test confirming IdleState always yields no-current.
PROP-EPNS-003: 1000-run property test with separate empty-body and non-empty-body arbitraries verifying isEmpty biconditional.
PROP-EPNS-004: 1000-run property test with SaveFailedState variants (varied pendingNextNoteId and SaveError). Confirms result.kind=dirty, result.noteId=state.currentNoteId, result.note===input note.
PROP-EPNS-005: Tier 0 compile-time exhaustiveness via never branch in switch. Runtime test confirms the handler executes correctly.

sprint4ResolutionStatus.FIND-001_step2TestsMissing4thArg: RESOLVED — All 9 flushCurrentSession calls in step2 tests now include the 4th previousFrontmatter parameter
sprint4ResolutionStatus.FIND-002_emitTypeWidth: PERSISTS — Carried forward as sprint 5 FIND-001 (minor). Emit port still typed as { kind: string; [k: string]: unknown } instead of PublicDomainEvent | CaptureInternalEvent
sprint4ResolutionStatus.FIND-003_propEpns018NoTest: PERSISTS — Carried forward as sprint 5 FIND-002 (minor). PROP-EPNS-018 is Tier 3, required: false, and architecturally untestable at current pipeline boundary
